title: Taiwan MND reports 28 PLA aircraft and 9 PLAN vessels detected around Taiwan, 16 crossing median line
summary: Taiwan Ministry of National Defense confirmed detection of 28 PLA aircraft including J-20 fighters and H-6K bombers, plus 9 PLAN vessels operating around Taiwan. Sixteen aircraft crossed the Taiwan Strait median line and entered southwestern and eastern ADIZ sectors.
contents:
# Taiwan MND Daily Report: 28 PLA Aircraft and 9 Vessels Detected

## Official Report (as of 0600 UTC+8, May 1, 2026)
Taiwan's Ministry of National Defense released its daily PLA activity summary confirming elevated military operations around the island.

## Air Activity
- **Total aircraft detected**: 28
- **Aircraft crossing median line**: 16
- **ADIZ zones affected**: Southwestern and eastern sectors

### Aircraft Breakdown
- 4x J-20 stealth fighters
- 8x J-16 multirole fighters
- 4x J-10C fighters
- 2x H-6K strategic bombers
- 2x Y-9 electronic warfare aircraft
- 2x KJ-500 AEW&C aircraft
- 2x Y-20 tanker aircraft
- 4x unspecified support aircraft

## Naval Activity
- **Total PLAN vessels**: 9
- Types include destroyers, frigates, and support vessels
- Operating in waters north and southwest of Taiwan

## Official Ships
- 4 China Coast Guard vessels detected operating near Taiwan's contiguous zone

## ROC Armed Forces Response
ROC Armed Forces monitored the situation and responded with combat air patrol aircraft, Navy vessels, and coastal-based missile systems. Enhanced monitoring protocols remain active.

## Context
Today's activity count exceeds the May 2026 daily average, reflecting continued elevated PLA operational tempo since the April Strait Thunder-2025A exercises.
